failures.description: The Executor selected the last and most expensive returned item instead of the first and cheapest item from the price-ascending ProductCatalogSearch results.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The relevant tool output was available at index 3 and listed 11 available Electric Kettle items sorted by ascending price. The first item, 1240311797, has the lowest price at $137.17. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer claiming item 2243454707 at $164.46 was the cheapest, which directly contradicts the tool output. This is not an invalid tool call, unsupported intent, underspecification, or guardrail issue; it is a reasoning error over the returned evidence.
